metadata.title: Image Magician
metadata.description: Supports viewing and exporting various image formats powerd by ImageMagick.

regex.source: description: "This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Supports viewing and exporting various image formats using ImageMagick."
regex.target: description: "这是一个用于Obsidian（https://obsidian.md）的插件。支持使用ImageMagick查看和导出各种图片格式。"
text: `${插件全名}：文件'${path2}'出现错误。`

regex.source: SUPPORTED_FORMATS_DESC: "The plugin will support viewing the image formats listed here. Additionally, you can try any image format by adding it to the list with comma separation. If you attempt to remove a format from the list, restart the Obsidian application to apply the changes."
regex.target: SUPPORTED_FORMATS_DESC: "该插件将支持查看以下列出的图片格式。此外，您可以尝试通过用逗号分隔将其添加到列表中的任何图片格式。如果您尝试从列表中移除某种格式，请重新启动 Obsidian 应用程序以应用更改。"

regex.source: FORMATS_WARN: "Warning: attempting to add already supported extensions in obsidian"
regex.target: FORMATS_WARN: "警告：尝试在Obsidian中添加已支持的扩展"

regex.source: MD_SUPPORT: "Markdown support (for plugin-supported image formats only)."
regex.target: MD_SUPPORT: "仅支持插件支持的图片格式的Markdown。"

regex.source: MD_SUPPORT_DESC: "Here are some options to make the supported image formats in the plugin behave like default Obsidian image formats in markdown."
regex.target: MD_SUPPORT_DESC: "这里有一些选项，可以使插件中支持的图片格式在markdown中表现得像默认的Obsidian图片格式。"

regex.source: INLINE_LINK_RENDER_DESC: "The markdown inline link, such as ![[...]], will be rendered."
regex.target: INLINE_LINK_RENDER_DESC: "Markdown内联链接，例如 ![[...]]，将被渲染。"

regex.source: HTML_IMG_RENDER_RES_PATH_DESC: `The tag will be rendered with the file's resource path in the "src" attribute, such as src="app://..../img.psd"`
regex.target: HTML_IMG_RENDER_RES_PATH_DESC: `标签将使用文件的资源路径在"src"属性中进行渲染，例如src="app://..../img.psd"。`

regex.source: SUPPORT_VAULT_PATH_IN_ELEMENT: "Supports using vault path syntax in

regex.target: 元素中使用 vault 路径语法。"

regex.source: SUPPORT_VAULT_PATH_IN_ELEMENT_DEC: `With this option, you can insert vault file paths in the 'src' attribute, such as
regex.target: SUPPORT_VAULT_PATH_IN_ELEMENT_DEC: `使用这个选项，您可以在“src”属性中插入保险库文件路径，例如
PLAIN_PATH_DESC: '检测纯文本，例如 `src="文件夹/图片.png"`'

regex.source: LINK_SYNTAX_DESC: 'Detects markdown link syntax, such as `src="[[Image.png]]"`'
EXPORT_DESC: "Broader supported image formats, such as png, jpg, and webp, are always better in markdown."
regex.target: EXPORT_DESC: "支持更广泛的图片格式，如 png、jpg 和 webp，在markdown中总是更好。"

regex.source: INSTANT_EXPORT_FILE_TYPES_DESC: "Easily access the image export dialog from the file context menu or a command if the active file's extension is included in the list. You can try different image formats by adding them to the list using commas for separation."
regex.target: INSTANT_EXPORT_FILE_TYPES_DESC: "如果活动文件的扩展名包含在列表中，则可以通过文件上下文菜单或命令轻松访问图像导出对话框。您可以通过用逗号分隔它们将不同的图像格式添加到列表中进行尝试。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_RENAME: "Rename exproted images on source file rename"
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_RENAME: "在源文件重命名时重命名导出的图像"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_RENAME_DESC: "Exported images will be renamed when their source files are renamed."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_RENAME_DESC: "当源文件被重命名时，导出的图片也将被重命名。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_DELETE: "Delete exported images on source file delete"
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_DELETE: "删除源文件时删除导出的图片"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_DELETE_DESC: "Exported images will be deleted when their source files are deleted."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_OPT_DELETE_DESC: "导出的图片将在其源文件被删除时一并删除。"

regex.source: SOURCE_FOLDER_DESC: "Specify the folder to include its children files in export entries, or leave it empty to set it as the vault's root folder."
regex.target: SOURCE_FOLDER_DESC: "指定要在导出条目中包含其子文件的文件夹，或者将其留空以将其设置为vault的根文件夹。"
RECURSIVE_DESC: "递归包含子文件夹中的文件。"

regex.source: IMAGE_FORMAT_FILTER_DESC: "Insert the image formats you want to be exported, separated by commas."
regex.target: IMAGE_FORMAT_FILTER_DESC: "插入您希望导出的图片格式，用逗号分隔。"

regex.source: FILTERS_DESC: "You can export specific files using filter options."
regex.target: FILTERS_DESC: "您可以使用筛选选项导出特定文件。"

regex.source: BUILT_IN_FILTERS_DESC: "Filters to enhance auto-export stability. You can enable or disable each setting individually."
regex.target: BUILT_IN_FILTERS_DESC: "用于增强自动导出稳定性的过滤器。您可以单独启用或禁用每个设置。"

regex.source: DOUBLE_EXTS_BLOCKER_DESC: "Avoid export if source file has at least two extensions. The filter determine file is already exported from another source. e.g, 'MyImage.psd.exported.png'"
regex.target: DOUBLE_EXTS_BLOCKER_DESC: "如果源文件具有至少两个扩展名，请避免导出。该过滤器确定文件是否已经从另一个源导出。例如，'MyImage.psd.exported.png'。"

regex.source: FOLDER_LOCATION_DESC: "Specify the folder location where the generated file will be placed."
regex.target: FOLDER_LOCATION_DESC: "指定生成文件的存放位置。"
FOLDER_LOCATION_TYPE_ABSOLUTE_WITH_REFLECT_STRUCTURE: "绝对路径，反映源文件夹结构"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_DESC: "Automatically export the images in the selected format when the original image is modified or created."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_DESC: "当原始图像被修改或创建时，自动以所选格式导出图片。"

regex.source: AJDS_IMG_SIZE_DESC: "With these options, the image will resize to the dimensions subsequently listed here during the export process. If you want to maintain the aspect ratio, leave the other size component (width or height) empty. To flip an image, use a negative scale, such as '-1'."
regex.target: AJDS_IMG_SIZE_DESC: "使用这些选项，图像将在导出过程中调整到后续列出的尺寸。如果要保持纵横比，请将另一个尺寸组件（宽度或高度）留空。要翻转图像，请使用负数的比例，如“-1”。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP: "Tip: Recommended settings to prevent an infinite export loop."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP: "提示: 建议的设置以防止无限导出循环。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_DESC: "In general, the plugin efficiently blocks an infinite export loop by using built-in filters and including two file extensions in the exported file name. When you want to break these default rules, an infinite export loop can occur with exported files having the same file extension, for example, 'MyImage.png.export.png.' In this circumstance, the auto-export process will continue until the file name exceeds its limit. If you find yourself in this situation, please refer to the following details."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_DESC: "一般情况下，该插件通过使用内置过滤器和在导出文件名中包含两个文件扩展名，有效地阻止了无限导出循环。当您想要打破这些默认规则时，可能会出现具有相同文件扩展名的导出文件导致无限导出循环，例如'MyImage.png.export.png.' 在这种情况下，自动导出过程将持续进行，直到文件名超出其限制。如果您发现自己处于这种情况，请参考以下详细信息。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_1: "1. Set a specific source folder instead of the root folder of the vault or turn off the recursive option."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_1: "设置特定的源文件夹，而不是存储库的根文件夹，或者关闭递归选项。"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_2: "2. Keep the source and exported folders separate"
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_2: "2. 保持源文件夹和导出文件夹分开"

regex.source: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_3: "3. For plans with complex settings, consider using filters."
regex.target: AUTO_EXPORT_TIP_3: "3. 对于具有复杂设置的计划，请考虑使用过滤器。"
PROCESS_AUTO_EXPORT_SETTINGS: "处理所有自动导出设置"
PROCESS_AUTO_EXPORT_SETTINGS_FORCED: "处理所有自动导出设置（强制）"
EXCALIDRAW_STRETCHED_EMBEDDING: "Excalidraw: 拉伸图像嵌入模式"
RENDER_OPT_DATA_URL: "数据 URL（Markdown 导出友好）"

regex.source: RENDER_MODE_DESC: "Choose a rendering solution; if you encounter issues with export/publish, try the 'Data URL' option. You need to reload the document to apply changes."
regex.target: RENDER_MODE_DESC: "选择一个渲染解决方案；如果在导出/发布过程中遇到问题，请尝试选择“数据URL”选项。您需要重新加载文档以应用更改。"

regex.source: ERROR_IMAGE_MAGICK_LOAD_FAILED: "Initialization failed with ImageMagick. The browser appears lack of compatibility. Please try reinstalling this plugin or restarting the application."
regex.target: ERROR_IMAGE_MAGICK_LOAD_FAILED: "初始化ImageMagick失败。浏览器似乎缺乏兼容性。请尝试重新安装此插件或重新启动应用程序。"

regex.source: FORMAT_FAILED_EXT_LIST: 'Some file extensions, such as "[${list}]" have failed to register in the obsidian app. The plugin will not support viewing them. Consider changing the ${name} plugin settings.'
regex.target: FORMAT_FAILED_EXT_LIST: '一些文件扩展名，如“[${list}]”，未能在obsidian应用中注册成功。该插件将无法支持查看它们。请考虑更改${name}插件的设置。'
